title: Weekly Mazars comment: Expert Sinologists Needed
section_path: Weekly Mazars comment: Expert Sinologists Needed
section_path_text: Weekly Mazars comment: Expert Sinologists Needed
summary:
Expert Sinologists Needed
Summary
Fund managers consider an inflation resurgence as 2023's biggest risk. There are three sources which could make inflation ‘sticky'. One is the consumer, who could begin to shift long-term expectations.
